name: Ubiquiti PoE Smart Chime
title: Ubiquiti PoE Smart Chime
short_description: The Ubiquiti UniFi PoE Smart Chime (UACC-Chime-PoE) is a notification device designed to seamlessly integrate with your UniFi Doorbell or Access Hub devices.
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi PoE Smart Chime (UACC-Chime-PoE) is a notification device designed to seamlessly integrate with your UniFi Doorbell or Access Hub devices. This compact and convenient chime eliminates the need for complex wiring and offers a user-friendly solution for expanding your doorbell notification system. Featuring a sleek and modern design, the UniFi PoE Smart Chime blends seamlessly into various home environments. Its compact size allows for discreet placement on walls or other flat surfaces. The chime boasts a powerful speaker with an adjustable volume output of up to 80 dB, ensuring clear and audible notifications even in larger spaces or noisy environments.

detailed_description.heading: Modern Design and Seamless Integration
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi PoE Smart Chime (UACC-Chime-PoE) is a notification device designed to seamlessly integrate with your UniFi Doorbell or Access Hub devices. This compact and convenient chime eliminates the need for complex wiring and offers a user-friendly solution for expanding your doorbell notification system. Featuring a sleek and modern design, the UniFi PoE Smart Chime blends seamlessly into various home environments. Its compact size allows for discreet placement on walls or other flat surfaces. The chime boasts a powerful speaker with an adjustable volume output of up to 80 dB, ensuring clear and audible notifications even in larger spaces or noisy environments.

detailed_description.heading: Simple Setup and Reliable Performance
detailed_description.text: The UniFi PoE Smart Chime prioritizes a user-friendly setup process. This chime eliminates the need for complex wiring configurations. It draws power directly through PoE (Power over Ethernet), allowing for a single cable connection to both power and transmit data. Additionally, the chime seamlessly integrates with your existing UniFi Protect system through the intuitive UniFi Protect mobile app or web interface. The UniFi PoE Smart Chime prioritizes reliable operation and low power consumption. PoE technology ensures a consistent power supply, eliminating concerns about battery replacements. Furthermore, the chime's compact design and energy-efficient operation minimize power draw, making it an environmentally friendly addition to your smart home system.

detailed_description.heading: Streamlined Management
detailed_description.text: The UniFi PoE Smart Chime empowers you to personalize your doorbell notification experience. Through the UniFi Protect app or web interface, you can adjust the chime volume to your preference, ensuring notifications are audible yet not disruptive. The UniFi Protect application provides a centralized platform for managing your doorbell settings, customizing chime tones and volume, and monitoring the chime's operational status – all from the convenience of your mobile device or computer. With its user-friendly features, seamless integration, and reliable performance, the Ubiquiti UniFi PoE Smart Chime is a compelling choice for enhancing your UniFi doorbell or door access system with convenient and customizable notification sounds.
